change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Collection of catalogs and brochures from food producers and purveyors, kitchen equipment companies, and other direct mail marketers relating to food, lifestyle, and cooking.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection of catalogs and brochures from food producers and purveyors, kitchen equipment companies, and other direct mail marketers relating to food, lifestyle, and cooking.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Food Marketing Collection, #6560. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: B (Beecher's, Bertie County Peanuts, Burgers' Smokehouse)
Better Homes & Gardens, The Country Gentleman, and Ladies Home Journal (o/s)
C (Cascade Complete, Christmas Cookings from the Heart, Chukar Cherries, Clipper Magazine, Cookings Club)
Discrimination in restaurants: "Have You Heard What's Cooking?"
Easy to Bake Easy to Make
